originalTitle: What next for South African opposition firebrand Malema after his five-year prison sentence?
title: What next for South African opposition firebrand Malema after his five-year prison sentence?
content: The sentence raises huge questions marks over the political future of one of South Africa's most controversial politicians.

originalTitle: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
content: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.

title: Thousands celebrate open-air Mass with Pope Leo in Cameroon - in pictures
content: Pope Leo XIV is on his third day in Cameroon before he heads to Angola on Saturday.

originalTitle: Arsenal to embrace ‘privilege’ not pressure of Man City Premier League tilt
title: Arsenal to embrace ‘privilege’ not pressure of Man City Premier League tilt
content: Arsenal travel to Manchester City knowing their Premier League could be eradicated by next Wednesday.

title: Macron demands assurances after Iran opens Strait of Hormuz
content: French President Emmanuel Macron said he welcomed the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and the Lebanon ceasefire.

originalTitle: Record number of Rohingya refugees died at sea last year, UNHCR says
title: Record number of Rohingya refugees died at sea last year, UNHCR says
content: The UN refugee agency has warned of an 'unmarked graveyard for thousands of desperate Rohingya refugees' in South Asia

originalTitle: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
title: Oil prices plunge as Iran says Strait 'open'
content: Brent crude sinks by a tenth after Iran says the key waterway is open for commercial ships for the rest of the ceasefire.

originalTitle: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
title: Ceasefire with Israel brings respite to Lebanon, but obstacles to peace remain
content: The halt to weeks of fighting is being celebrated in Lebanon, but it will be difficult to ensure it lasts.

title: Bournemouth close to appointing Rose
content: Bournemouth are close to appointing Marco Rose as Andoni Iraola's replacement as head coach.

title: What does the Saudi Arabia PIF's change in approach mean for Newcastle?
content: Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund (PIF) set out to disrupt, but the fund has sent tremors through the world of sport in a very different way this week.

originalTitle: One of Arsenal's greatest unsung heroes - Keown's tribute to Manninger
title: One of Arsenal's greatest unsung heroes - Keown's tribute to Manninger
content: Former Arsenal defender Martin Keown pays tribute to his old friend and former Gunners team-mate Alex Manninger, who has died at the age of 48.
